text: Being here fills me with a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The dim lighting and glowing screens evoke an atmosphere of secrecy and quiet contemplation. The R+D wall hints at innovation and the pursuit of knowledge, while the empty, luminous room beyond the glass feels like a threshold waiting to be crossed. I am both an observer and a participant in the mystery of creation, watching as the boundaries between perception and inquiry blur in the half-shadows.
